title: phyllanthus grandifolius var. cornifolius
intro: Phyllanthus grandifolius var. cornifolius, also known as the Phyllanthus cornifolius, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and kidney ailments, and is also valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus cornifolius include its ability to improve liver function, protect against oxidative stress, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
